source_signals.checked_fact: TÜYZE is the Türkiye Sağlık Veri Araştırmaları ve Yapay Zeka Uygulamaları Enstitüsü public site.
The site lists a Sağlıkta Yapay Zeka Seminerleri program with Marmara University Faculty of Medicine from 08 April to 20 May 2026.
The site lists health AI and health data related institutional activity with public, university, and technology actors.
source_signals.field_read: A readiness kit can be framed as public field preparation, not as a partner claim.

modules.name: Public health AI safety brief
modules.field_user: health AI educator or lab coordinator
modules.artifact: One page brief explaining why source support, data quality, clinician review, and no ranking language matter.
modules.decision_value: Gives a reviewer enough context to decide whether a meeting or review is worth considering.

modules.name: Clinician AI literacy micro module
modules.artifact: Short handoff module that explains no patient data, no clinical validation, and no deployment claims.
modules.decision_value: Converts abstract AI safety into teachable clinician review language.

modules.name: Source support delta queue
modules.artifact: Queue for separating citation presence from source support and source truth certification.
modules.decision_value: Shows a practical review path without ranking a model.

modules.name: Health data quality handoff
modules.artifact: Checklist for label uncertainty, leakage, missing context, data provenance, and reviewer disagreement.
modules.decision_value: Moves the conversation from model performance to data readiness.

modules.name: Sandbox readiness boundary
modules.artifact: Boundary note that blocks route access, approval, validation, and deployment claims.
modules.decision_value: Lets a group discuss sandbox readiness without implying access or endorsement.

modules.name: First outreach packet
modules.field_user: Dr. Goktug Ozkan after explicit clearance
modules.artifact: Short introduction draft and attachment list for a named national health AI route.
modules.decision_value: Turns proof of work into a field conversation while preserving decision gates.
